name: The Inner Ways Nightclub Rave
description: Hello wanderers, visit our HQ pool area and dance to IRL live music played by our guild DJ's every Friday night 30 mins after in-game reset! Come chat, dance and bring your friends! :)

name: The Inner Ways Nightclub Rave (Sat)
description: Hello wanderers, visit our HQ pool area and dance to IRL live music played by our guild DJ's every Saturday night 30 mins after in-game reset! Come chat, dance and bring your friends! :)

name: Fairytopia Tour Season 5
description:
## Fairytopia Tour Season 5 <t:1783947600:F>

Anyone would like to invite us to join your Solo world or guild base, just write your name ✨ ✨ ✨

name: Panda Guild Tour #11 - All Welcome!
description:
- Join the tour stream on https://discord.com/channels/1483447710617960508/1483447711499030636
- Join in game request/DM on Moonlight [0015300816]
- Communicate through our group chat (id:110975624)  or vocal

## React/Vote the builds on their discord thread!

- [HeavenlyPillar](https://www.wherebuildersmeet.com/guilds/heavenlypillar/) | [Discord thread](https://discord.com/channels/1483447710617960508/1519748335324364963)  |  Builder: Panhua, Firelith, Xiongbao, Ralpx, Eljiro, WeiNel, LuoWeiLian, greatjussy
- [Milk](https://www.wherebuildersmeet.com/guilds/milk/)  |  [Discord thread](https://discord.com/channels/1483447710617960508/1520911008053592166)  |  Builder: RiriLala, TopoByte, pfftkrystal, valkyrie
- [LittleFurry](https://www.wherebuildersmeet.com/guilds/littlefurry/)  |  [Discord thread](https://discord.com/channels/1483447710617960508/1521627275890524170)  |  Builder: barashfr

Tour should last ~1H, each guild tour should take ~15/20min.
